zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady. Elizabeth Brocton於1430年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗時，她的父親William Brocton Jr19歲，母親Jane Newcomb19歲。她於1444年與Sir William Hayward在英國史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1489年在她的家鄉享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brocton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Broxton in Cheshire, an obscure name, possibly from Old English burgæsn ‘burial place’.
habitational name from Browston in Suffolk, recorded in Domesday Book as Brockestuna, from the Old English personal name Brocc (from Old English brocc ‘badger’) + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

variants.name: Broxson
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of   Broxton  . This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady. Elizabeth Brocton was born in 1430, in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Brocton Jr, was 19 and her mother, Jane Newcomb, was 19. She married Sir William Hayward in 1444, in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1489, in her hometown, at the age of 59.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady. Elizabeth Brocton(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 론그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Brocton Jr(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Newcomb(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 슈럽실르 스탠턴 론그에서 Sir William Hayward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1489년 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady. Elizabeth Brocton родилась в 1430 г. в местности стантон лонг, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Brocton Jr было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Newcomb, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hayward в 1444 г. в местности стантон лонг, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1489 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.
